title: NoSpam
description: Simple and efficient anti-spam plugin for protecting Minecraft server chat.
body:
¡¡¡¡¡ABANDONED!!!!!!
¡¡¡¡¡ABANDONED!!!!!!

Plugin Name: **NoSpam**

Version: **1.2.0**

Author: **Ramirez**

Team: **DA Development**

Languages Supported: **English (EN), Spanish (ES), Deutsch (DE)**

## _Description_

**NoSpam** is an advanced chat protection plugin for Minecraft servers. It helps keep your server chat clean, safe, and enjoyable by preventing spam, flood, excessive caps, bad words, and unwanted links. Fully configurable and multilingual, NoSpam is perfect for servers of any size.
## 

##  **Features:**

Anti-Spam & Flood Protection: Prevents players from sending messages too quickly.

Repeated Message Blocking: Stops players from sending the same message multiple times.

Repeated Character Protection: Limits characters repeated in a row to avoid annoying spam.

Anti-Caps: Detects excessive capital letters and prevents shouting in chat.

Anti-Bad Words: Blocks configurable bad words (e.g., “pendejo”) from being sent.

Anti-Links: Automatically blocks common links such as YouTube, Twitch, Discord, IPs, and more.

 Whitelist Support: Allows certain links or domains to bypass the anti-link system.

Fully Configurable: Adjust delays, max repeated characters, bad words list, anti-caps, anti-links, and more.
 
Multilingual Support: English, Spanish, and German.

**Permission System:** Granular control over who can bypass filters or reload the plugin.

## **Permissions:**

nospam.admin → Full access to all features.

nospam.reload → Allows reloading the plugin.

nospam.bypass → Bypass all anti-spam, anti-flood, anti-caps, and bad words filters.

nospam.bypass.links → Bypass only the anti-link system.

nospam.bypass.badwords → Bypass badwords
## 

## **Commands:**

/nospam reload → Reload the plugin configuration and languages.

/nospam antilink → Enable or disable the anti-link system.
